name: 갑수
visual_description: An elderly man with a wrinkled face and trembling hands. He has short, thinning grey hair. He wears simple, worn-out clothes, reflecting a life of hardship. He is often seen with a melancholic expression and teary eyes. He is seen taking out an old postman bag, indicating he was a postman in the past. He looks frail but determined, with a burning rage in his eyes.
consistency_prompt: Elderly Korean man, former postman, holding a rusty key, filled with rage and sorrow.
